metadata.title: REACH PROJECTOR - OEM/ODM Projection Solutions
metadata.description: Your OEM/ODM projection partner. Turnkey projector solutions for hospitality, retail, events, and education. White-label, bulk deployment, and AI-powered marketing assets.
metadata.keywords: OEM projector, ODM projector, projection solutions, white-label projector, hospitality projector, education projector, events projector, B2B, REACH

hero.subtitle: Your OEM/ODM Projection Partner
hero.description: From concept to shelf — we provide OEM/ODM projectors, scenario-based accessories, and AI-powered marketing assets.

solutions.title: Tailored Solutions for Every Scenario
solutions.description: Turnkey projection solutions designed for your specific business needs. All solutions available for white-label / OEM.

hospitality.title: Hospitality & Living
hospitality.desc: Premium in-room entertainment and lobby installations for hotels, Airbnbs, and residential cinemas. Custom branding and bulk deployment support.

retail.title: Retail & Channels / OEM
retail.desc: Complete product line setup for retail chains, distributors, and online sellers. White-label packaging, marketing materials, and dropshipping support.

events.title: Events & Rentals
events.desc: High-brightness, portable projection systems for conferences, exhibitions, live events, and rental businesses. Rugged designs for frequent transport.

education.title: Education & Corporate
education.desc: Reliable projection solutions for classrooms, boardrooms, and training centers. Easy installation, low maintenance, and volume pricing.

cards.title: End-to-End Technical Support
cards.desc: From optical parameter tuning to certification guidance (CE, FCC, RoHS), we handle the full technical pipeline so you can focus on sales.

cards.title: Differentiated Product Mix
cards.desc: Projector + mount + screen + accessories as bundled solutions. Stand out from competitors with curated, scenario-specific packages.

cards.title: AI-Powered Marketing Assets
cards.desc: We provide AI-generated product images, scenario renders, SEO content, and social media materials — ready to use for your channels.

contentStudio.title: Accelerate Your Launch with Our Content Studio
contentStudio.desc: Don't just source hardware — launch your brand faster with our AI-powered content library. Get professional product photography, scene renders, marketing copy, and social media assets included with every OEM partnership.

inspiration.title: Inspiration for Your Space
inspiration.desc: Discover how our projection solutions transform everyday spaces into extraordinary experiences.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.realShipment: Real shipment from our warehouse to global customers

b2b.title: Ready to Build Your Brand?
b2b.description: Whether you need 10 units or 10,000, we provide the products, branding, and content to make your projection business a success.

features.bulkPricingDesc: Competitive wholesale pricing for volume orders
features.dedicatedSupportDesc: Personal account manager for B2B clients
features.fastShippingDesc: Priority processing and express delivery options

footer.aboutText: Your OEM/ODM projection partner. We provide projectors, mounts, screens and accessories with white-label and bulk deployment support for global businesses.
footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to get special offers and updates

products.title: Products
products.noProductsDesc: Try adjusting your filters or search terms

jmgo-n5s-ultra-max-4k.name: JMGO N5S ULTRA MAX 4K
jmgo-n5s-ultra-max-4k.shortDescription: Premium 4K laser projector with exceptional brightness and color accuracy for home theater.
jmgo-n5s-ultra-max-4k.description: The JMGO N5S ULTRA MAX 4K delivers an immersive cinematic experience with its advanced laser light source, delivering stunning 4K resolution with vivid colors and deep contrasts. Perfect for dedicated home theater setups.

xgimi-rs-10-ultra-4k.name: XGIMI RS 10 Ultra 4K
xgimi-rs-10-ultra-4k.shortDescription: Flagship 4K laser projector with dual laser engine and Dolby Vision support.
xgimi-rs-10-ultra-4k.description: The XGIMI RS 10 Ultra represents the pinnacle of home projection technology. Featuring a dual laser engine that delivers unparalleled brightness and color volume, with Dolby Vision and HDR10+ for the most lifelike images.

xgimi-rs-10-mini-4k.name: XGIMI RS 10 Mini 4K
xgimi-rs-10-mini-4k.shortDescription: Compact 4K laser projector with premium features in a smaller form factor.
xgimi-rs-10-mini-4k.description: The XGIMI RS 10 Mini 4K brings flagship performance to a compact design. Perfect for smaller rooms while maintaining incredible image quality and smart features.

hisense-vidda-c5-master-4k.name: Hisense VIDDA C5 Master 4K
hisense-vidda-c5-master-4k.shortDescription: Professional-grade 4K laser projector with cinema-level color accuracy.
hisense-vidda-c5-master-4k.description: The Hisense VIDDA C5 Master 4K is engineered for the most demanding home theater enthusiasts. With cinema-grade color accuracy and advanced laser technology, every frame comes alive with breathtaking detail.

hisense-px2-pro-4k-ust.name: Hisense PX2-Pro 4K UST
hisense-px2-pro-4k-ust.shortDescription: Ultra Short Throw 4K laser TV with 120" image from inches away.
hisense-px2-pro-4k-ust.description: The Hisense PX2-Pro transforms any wall into a massive 120-inch 4K display from just inches away. Its ultra-short throw design eliminates shadows and glare, delivering a true cinema experience in your living room.

awol-vision-ltv-3500-4k.name: AWOL Vision LTV-3500 4K
awol-vision-ltv-3500-4k.shortDescription: Premium RGB triple laser UST projector with unmatched brightness.
awol-vision-ltv-3500-4k.description: The AWOL Vision LTV-3500 is the ultimate ultra-short throw projector featuring an RGB triple laser system that delivers extraordinary brightness and a color volume that surpasses any other projector in its class.

formovie-theater-4k.name: Formovie Theater 4K
formovie-theater-4k.shortDescription: Award-winning UST laser projector with ALPD 4.5 technology.
formovie-theater-4k.description: The Formovie Theater combines ALPD 4.5 laser technology with an ultra-short throw design to deliver stunning 4K images. Winner of multiple awards for its exceptional picture quality and value.

jmgo-u2-4k-laser-tv.name: JMGO U2 4K Laser TV
jmgo-u2-4k-laser-tv.shortDescription: Sleek 4K laser TV with superior optics and smart features.
jmgo-u2-4k-laser-tv.description: The JMGO U2 brings cinematic 4K quality to your living room with its compact laser TV design. Featuring advanced optics and smart connectivity for effortless entertainment.

xgimi-horizon-ultra.name: XGIMI Horizon Ultra
xgimi-horizon-ultra.shortDescription: Premium 4K HDR projector with Dolby Vision and hybrid light source.
xgimi-horizon-ultra.description: The XGIMI Horizon Ultra combines a hybrid light source (LED + Laser) for exceptional brightness and color accuracy. With Dolby Vision support and premium audio, it delivers a complete entertainment experience.

xgimi-mogo-3-pro.name: XGIMI MoGo 3 Pro
xgimi-mogo-3-pro.shortDescription: Portable 1080p projector with built-in battery and Android TV.
xgimi-mogo-3-pro.description: Take your entertainment anywhere with the XGIMI MoGo 3 Pro. This portable projector features a built-in battery for cord-free viewing and delivers impressive 1080p image quality.

jmgo-n1-ultra-4k.name: JMGO N1 Ultra 4K
jmgo-n1-ultra-4k.shortDescription: Compact 4K laser projector with innovative gimbal design.
jmgo-n1-ultra-4k.description: The JMGO N1 Ultra features an innovative built-in gimbal stand that allows 360-degree rotation and easy angle adjustment. Combined with 4K laser projection, it offers unmatched versatility.

hisense-pl1-4k-laser-tv.name: Hisense PL1 4K Laser TV
hisense-pl1-4k-laser-tv.shortDescription: Affordable 4K UST laser TV with impressive performance.
hisense-pl1-4k-laser-tv.description: The Hisense PL1 offers 4K ultra-short throw projection at an accessible price point. Perfect for those wanting a large-screen experience without the premium price tag.

about.subtitle: About REACH PROJECTOR
about.title: Your OEM/ODM Projection Partner
about.description: Founded with a mission to empower businesses worldwide with turnkey projection solutions, REACH PROJECTOR has grown into a trusted OEM/ODM partner for projectors, mounts, screens, and scenario-based accessories.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: REACH PROJECTOR started as a small team of projection enthusiasts in Shenzhen, China - the heart of the global electronics industry. Our deep connections with manufacturers and our passion for technology gave us a unique advantage.
story.paragraph2: Today, we serve customers in over 50 countries, from individual businesses seeking custom-branded projectors to large enterprises needing bulk deployment solutions. Our commitment to quality, competitive pricing, and exceptional service has made us the preferred partner for many.

whyChoose.title: Why Businesses Choose Us
whyChoose.description: We provide end-to-end solutions for B2B and B2C customers worldwide
whyChoose.authenticProductsDesc: Official authorization from all brands we carry. Every product is 100% genuine with full manufacturer warranty and support.
whyChoose.competitivePricingDesc: Direct relationships with manufacturers mean we can offer the most competitive prices. Volume discounts available for B2B orders.
whyChoose.globalLogisticsDesc: Delivered Duty Paid service to 50+ countries. We handle all customs, duties, taxes, and logistics. Zero hassle for you.
whyChoose.expertTeamDesc: Every product undergoes quality inspection before shipping. We stand behind every product with comprehensive after-sales support.
whyChoose.globalReachDesc: Serving customers across Europe, Americas, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East. Multi-language support available.
whyChoose.dedicatedSupportDesc: Expert product consultation, technical support, and account management. Available via WhatsApp, email, and phone.

cta.title: Ready to Start a Partnership?
cta.description: Whether you need a single projector or a container load of electronics, we have the products, pricing, and logistics to make it happen.

contact.title: Let's Start a Conversation
contact.subtitle: Have a question about our products? Need a wholesale quote? We're here to help.
contact.description: Our team is ready to help you find the perfect solution. Get in touch via WhatsApp, email, or phone.
contact.whatsappDescription: For the fastest response, message us on WhatsApp. We typically reply within 30 minutes during business hours.
contact.formDescription: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
